title: Show HN: I replaced a $120k bowling center system with $1,600 in ESP32s
summary: A bowling center owner replaced a $120k proprietary scoring system with a custom open-source solution using ESP32 microcontrollers, sensors, and a Raspberry Pi. The system uses ESPNow mesh networking with RS485 fallback, event streaming via Redis, and a React-based UI. Total cost: ~$200-400 per lane pair, with easy repairs and full data ownership.
